headline: Meta Spends $50 Billion More on AI. Is That a Good Thing?
summary: Meta stock has been boosted by signs it is becoming more competitive in AI, but JP Morgan isn’t convinced yet.

headline: Meta Lifts Cost of Louisiana Data Center to $50 Billion
summary: The company scaled up the size of its massive data-center project in Northeast Louisiana to 5 gigawatts of compute capacity and said it would now cost more than $50 billion.

raw.headline: Meta Lifts Cost of Louisiana Data Center to $50 Billion
raw.summary: The company scaled up the size of its massive data-center project in Northeast Louisiana to 5 gigawatts of compute capacity and said it would now cost more than $50 billion.

headline: The 10 worst state economies in America in 2026
summary: Economy is a key category in CNBC’s America’s Top States for Business study, and some states stand out for the wrong reasons.

headline: Meta expands Louisiana data center in $50B AI push, boosting rural community
summary: Meta said the $50 billion expansion will make its Richland Parish site one of the largest data centers in history while bringing jobs and new funding to the rural community.

raw.headline: Meta expands Louisiana data center in $50B AI push, boosting rural community
